category_sources: Official GitHub README describes zfp as a compressed format for multidimensional floating-point and integer arrays.
source_facts.description says zfp provides compressed numerical arrays with high-speed random access.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project site use the name zfp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links full HTML documentation on zfp.readthedocs.io.
ReadTheDocs page provides zfp documentation contents for installation, algorithms, compression modes, APIs, Python, Fortran, and C++ classes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/llnl/zfp; per instructions repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README states zfp supports floating-point and integer arrays, lossy and lossless compression, and C, C++, Python, and Fortran bindings.
Official GitHub topics include compression, arrays, and floating-point.
